title: Inclusive Education Assessment & IEP Toolkit | Complete Referral-to-IEP System | Excel & Google Sheets
description:
The Inclusive Education Assessment & IEP Toolkit brings the entire special education process into one organized Excel workbook — from the moment a child is referred, through parent consent, assessment, eligibility, and placement, to a completed IEP and ongoing progress monitoring. Built for schools and practitioners who need a structured, professional system without expensive standardized test kits or scattered paperwork.

What's Inside?
 ✅ Referral & Parent Consent Forms 
 ✅ 7-Domain Criterion-Referenced Assessment Battery 
 ✅ Eligibility & Placement Framework 
 ✅ IEP Template + SMART Goal Bank 
 ✅ Progress Monitoring System 

Works in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets, with dropdown selections and automatic score calculations to keep documentation fast and consistent.

Suited for SPED teachers, school placement teams, and assessment centers. This toolkit provides criterion-referenced, informal assessment tools to support educational decision-making; it is not a standardized instrument and should be used alongside professional judgment.

One purchase covers one professional. For multi-user or school site licenses, questions, or support:
📧 inclusiveinterventionhub@gmail.com
🌐 inclusivematerials.com
